human_verification.method: spec-pack readiness review against issue #1628 acceptance criteria

tenant_runtime_dependencies: automation goal, success criteria, triggering event, volume, SLA, and business owner
workflow exports, workflow files, solution package, run history, logs, API contracts, connector inventory, credential model, tests, and release records
tenant connector/DLP policies, data classification, confidentiality terms, approved recipients, client commitments, and approval matrix
stop_conditions: missing required artifacts or systems of record
conflicting vendor, public, tenant, or client authority without authorized precedence
client rights, professional judgment, legal, contractual, risk, budget, procurement, identity, infrastructure, SRE, product, or pricing authority controls the answer
confidential data would leave approved tenant systems or recipients

notes: manifest.yaml records runtime_strategy=specification-based and does not claim retained implementation ownership.
evaluation/research-summary.json satisfies the professional-and-information-services domain research pack with required source classes and scenario families.
evaluation/functionality-map.json declares all shared, review-assessment-and-inspection, and professional-and-information-services abilities with scenario coverage.
evaluation/results.json records 18 passing scenarios, full functionality coverage, no unreviewed regressions, and accuracy acceptance met.
deployment/package.md and positioning/readiness.md document validated deployment, rollback, monitoring, tenant isolation, commercialization, and promotion criteria.
